refactor_examples.overview: Complete examples demonstrating the XML-to-Grid-config refactoring workflow.

example.name: leave_tracking_grid
example.scenario: User provides XML for a leave tracking (nghỉ phép) grid with 23 columns from coldgrtieuchuan tags, plus 2 existing columns (STT, NV_TEN) already in the Vue component.
example.sample_xml: <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="NV_Ten" title="Họ Tên" hide="false" width="150" positionCol="1"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="DV_Ma_" title="Đơn vị" hide="false" width="80" positionCol="2"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="NV_Ma" title="Số thẻ" hide="false" width="80" positionCol="3"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="CV_Ten" title="Chức vụ" hide="false" width="120" positionCol="4"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="NV_Ngayvao" title="Ngày vào" hide="false" width="90" positionCol="5"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="PN_SoNgayNamTruoc" title="Phép năm năm trước" hide="false" width="60" positionCol="6"/>

step_1_result.description: Parse and UPPERCASE all column names, sort by positionCol
step_1_result.parsed_columns: NV_TEN (pos 1), DV_MA_ (pos 2), NV_MA (pos 3), CV_TEN (pos 4), NV_NGAYVAO (pos 5), PN_SONGAYNAMTRUOC (pos 6)

step_2_result.classifications: NV_TEN → text (rule: _TEN pattern) DV_MA_ → text (rule: _MA pattern) NV_MA → text (rule: _MA pattern) CV_TEN → text (rule: _TEN pattern) NV_NGAYVAO → date (rule: title contains "Ngày") PN_SONGAYNAMTRUOC → number (rule: PN_ prefix)

step_3_output.description: Grid_0_cols_all — all columns including STT from original

step_4_output.description: Grid_0_cols_display — only visible columns (all visible in this example)

step_5_output.description: Grid_0_cols_labels — column name to Vietnamese title mapping

step_6_output.description: Grid_0_cols_types — column name to data type mapping

example.completion_report:
## Checklist cuối cùng
| Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | Tổng số cột trong cols_all | 7 | | Số cột bị ẩn (hide=true) | 0 | | Số cột hiển thị (cols_display) | 7 | | Phân loại types | 5 text, 1 number, 1 date, 0 action | | Cột đã UPPERCASE | NV_Ten→NV_TEN, DV_Ma_→DV_MA_, NV_Ma→NV_MA, CV_Ten→CV_TEN, NV_Ngayvao→NV_NGAYVAO, PN_SoNgayNamTruoc→PN_SONGAYNAMTRUOC |

key_takeaways.takeaway: Always UPPERCASE all column names — the XML may have mixed case
STT from original code is preserved even if not in XML
PN_ prefix columns are always number (leave day counts)
_TEN and _MA patterns are always text regardless of content

example.name: hidden_columns
example.scenario: XML contains columns with hide="true" — these appear in cols_all and cols_labels/cols_types but NOT in cols_display.
example.sample_xml: <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="NV_ID" title="ID" hide="TRUE" width="0" positionCol="0"/> <coldgrtieuchuan tblColName="NV_Ten" title="Họ Tên" hide="false" width="150" positionCol="1"/>

result.cols_labels: Both NV_ID and NV_TEN have labels
result.cols_types: Both NV_ID and NV_TEN have types
